description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named test that runs in the default test stage using the runner's default Docker image (no explicit image). The job executes the shell commands: apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y python-dev python-pip, pip install -r requirements.txt, make html, and mv public/html/ public/. It archives the public directory as an artifact and is configured to run only on the master branch.
